description: Interactive poll format asking Saudi followers to vote on food preferences, restaurant recommendations, or cooking methods using direct questions with food-related emojis.
structural_recipe: Post a food-related question with 2-3 clear options (e.g., best steak restaurant, preferred doneness level). Use Arabic colloquial phrasing ('وين' for 'where', 'برأيك' for 'in your opinion'). Include relevant food emoji (🥩, 🍽️, etc.). Format as direct question to encourage comment responses or poll interactions. Keep questions specific to Saudi dining context.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences engage with restaurant and food recommendations as trusted social signals. Opinion polls tap into the community's desire to share local knowledge and debate food preferences. The casual Arabic dialect creates familiarity and encourages participatory responses rather than passive consumption.
transplantation_caveats: May require localization of restaurant references and food preferences to target market
Opinion polls work best when asking about widely-known or accessible restaurants/cuisines in the region
Lower engagement baseline (0% high-eng observed) suggests pattern may need visual enhancement or broader reach to succeed
